text: If Lot of Fortune and its Part in Gemini in a cadent house., then The first things were moderate.
If Sun trine Saturn AND Saturn in a cadent house., then The first things were moderate.

If Mercury (co-ruler) angular AND Lot of Fortune in Taurus AND its Part in Libra AND its ruler (Venus) midheaven to the Lot of Fortune AND angular to other things., then Rise from humble and moderate fortune to a commanding and authoritative fortune.
If Sun trine Venus AND Moon. AND Venus in a cadent house., then The first things were laborious and humble.
If Moon found angular., then Later became involved in military and commanding positions.
If Lot of Fortune in Taurus AND its Part in Cancer AND its ruler (Moon) midheaven to the Lot of Fortune., then Reached greatest fortune and commanding position.
If Mars found in the Perirochetic place., then Associated with theft, embezzlement, and violence, which were plundered after death.

If Night birth AND Moon trine Mars AND Mars cadent AND Mars cadent to the Lot of Fortune AND to its ruler., then The first things were humble and needy, suffered from slander and contempt, and was surrounded by many dangers.
If The co-rulers/co-significators ending in tetragonic places., then Became a royal official through friendships and restorations.
If The Part of Fortune found in Leo AND its ruler (Sun) midheaven to the Lot of Fortune., then Became a leader and held authoritative power.
If Lot of Fortune in Pisces AND Lot of Spirit in Pisces AND Jupiter, lord of the 3rd house, in Midheaven, then The native becomes a leader of friends, builds temples, and achieves eternal memory.

If Lot of Fortune in Pisces AND Jupiter in Pisces (ruling Lot of Fortune) AND Venus is the Ascendant AND Venus is the lord of the Lot of Fortune AND Venus is the lord of the Lot of Spirit, then The native inherits great wealth, even if born in infancy.
If Lords of the trigon are angular, then In the beginning, the nativity was well-off and prosperous.
If Lords of the trigon are opposing AND Mars, lord of the Lot of Fortune, is cadent AND Mars is aspected by Saturn, then Later became fallen and needy due to debt and seizure.
If Lords of the trigon are angular, then In the early years, the native had great visions, deeds, and political achievements.
If Mars opposes the Lot of Fortune AND Mercury opposes the Lot of Fortune AND Lords of the Lot of Fortune are cadent, then Later, the native was deposed by force and became a wanderer.

If Lords of the Sun's trigon are in domicile AND Lords of the Lot of Fortune are in domicile AND Lords of the Lot of Spirit are in domicile AND all are aspected by Jupiter, then Born a slave, the native entered a noble family, rose to political office, and became famous.
If Mars is cadent AND Saturn is cadent AND Eros is cadent, then The native's life was shortened and they became indebted.

If Sun in Aquarius AND Moon in Scorpio AND Jupiter in Scorpio AND Saturn in Cancer AND Mars in Capricorn AND Venus in Capricorn AND Mercury in Capricorn AND Ascendant in Pisces, then The native became a famous priest of the gods.
If The lords of the sect, Saturn and Mercury, are benefic (good daemons) but are found in opposition., then The native falls into many troubles, slanders, and princely/royal apologies.
If The Sun and Moon are in money-making houses, guarded by oriental planets, with no malefics opposing., then Nativities are fortunate, glorious, princely, and royal.
If The lords of the Sun and Moon are rising (on the Ascendant) or angular (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th houses)., then Nativities are fortunate, glorious, princely, and royal.
If The degree of the New Moon (synodic) or Full Moon is rising (on the Ascendant) or culminating (on the Midheaven)., then Natives will be fortunate.
If The lords of the degree of the New Moon (synodic) or Full Moon are rising (on the Ascendant) or culminating (on the Midheaven)., then Natives will be fortunate.

If The Sun is found under the earth (in the lower hemisphere, Houses 1-6)., then The native becomes famous and rich, but arranges their life badly, or is surrounded by envies, accusations, and slanders.

If The Moon is found under the earth (in the lower hemisphere, Houses 1-6)., then The native becomes famous and rich, but arranges their life badly, or is surrounded by envies, accusations, and slanders.

If Most of the planets are found under the earth (in the lower hemisphere, Houses 1-6)., then The native becomes famous and rich, but arranges their life badly, or is surrounded by envies, accusations, and slanders.

If The rulers of the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Basis, and Lot of Daimon exchange places (e.g., ruler of Fortune's Lot in Basis's place, Basis's Lot ruler in Daimon's place, Daimon's Lot ruler in Fortune's place)., then The native is fortunate and a royal official.
If The ruler of the Lot of Basis is in the place of the Lot of Daimon, and the ruler of the Lot of Daimon is also present., then The native is fortunate and great-famed.
If The rulers of the Lot of Daimon, Lot of Fortune, and Lot of Basis are in their own places., then The native is fortunate.
If The Lot of Daimon is found with the Sun, and its ruler is oriental., then The native will be fortunate.
If Venus rules the Lot of Fortune OR the Lot of Daimon OR the Lot of Basis, and is found oriental, and is in her own place., then The native is fortunate.
If The ruler is in the Lot of Basis, and the Moon is co-present with it., then The native will be fortunate and famous.
If The ruler is in the Lot of Daimon, and the Sun is co-present with it., then The native is fortunate, famous, and tyrannical (a powerful ruler).
If Mars is found in the Lot of Daimon, and in the places of the Moon, and the Moon is co-present., then A princely, ruling, glorious birth.

If Mercury is found in the Lot of Daimon, is oriental, is testified to by benefics, and is in the places of the Moon., then The native will be fortunate through writings and education, much loved, very knowledgeable, honored and revered, deemed worthy of glory, and blessed by many.

If Jupiter rules the Lot of Daimon, and is overcome by Saturn., then The native will not be unfortunate, but active and glorious. However, being involved in oppositions, he will be deposed or exiled and will lose everything.
If The ruler is co-present with the Lot of Daimon, is oriental, and with the Moon., then The native is fortunate, rich, and generous.
If The Sun is in the Lot of Daimon, is of its own sect, and its ruler is in its own place., then The native is glorious, honored, and much loved.
If The Sun is in the Lot of Daimon and is of the opposite sect., then The native will be fortunate after the times of the adversary.

If If the lord of the Lot of Fortune, or the Lot of Acquisition, or the Lot of Daimon falls into the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft., then The native's life will be characterized by violence, cunning, or some form of villainy.

If If the lords of the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Acquisition, Lot of Daimon, Lot of Treachery, and Lot of Theft are in the same sign or degree., then Violence, cunning, or villainy will characterize the native's life.

If If the lord of the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft aspects the Lot of Fortune, or the Lot of Daimon, or the Lot of Acquisition., then The affairs of the native's life will be found to stem from treachery or theft.

If If benefics bear witness to the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft, especially if they are in their own sect or in their own place., then The native's affairs related to treachery or theft become acceptable or chosen.

If If malefics bear witness to the Lot of Treachery or the Lot of Theft by opposition or square., then The manner of the native's life or affairs related to treachery or theft is clearly negative or difficult.

If If the Lot of Honor and Reputation has opposing malefics not appropriate to the sect of the nativity, OR its lord is not witnessed by Jupiter, especially when fixed stars are declining or the Moon is cadent., then There will be a downfall of glory and reputation.
If If the lord of the Lot of Fortune opposes the Lot of Reputation or the lord of the Lot of Reputation., then It makes the native's glory and reputation unstable or precarious.
If If the lord of the Lot of Daimon and the Lots themselves (e.g., Lot of Fortune, Lot of Reputation) are hostile to each other., then They cause a downfall of glory.
If If the Lot of Reputation and the Lot of Honor are in opposition and are opposed by malefics., then There will be a downfall of glory and reputation.

If The Lord of the Ascendant and the Lord of the Midheaven are in opposition to each other, OR their Lots (Parts) or their Dispositors are in opposition., then Those born are in disgrace/condemnation.
If Jupiter is on the Ascendant, angular, OR becomes lord of an angle., then Makes prominent men.
If Mars is in the sign of the Lot of Fortune, OR the Lot of Fortune is in a sign ruled by Mars., then Those born rule over deaths.
If Angular or succedent places and planets are found in financial/money-making signs., then Make brilliant, leadership, royal nativities.
If Planets/places are in succedent signs/houses., then Make learned, successful, ruling (archons).
If Planets/places are in cadent signs/houses., then Make fortunate, practical, placed under someone's authority, worthy of trust and order.
If The Lot of Fortune, Lot of Spirit, and Lot of Basis fall into the same place., then Fortunate, leading, tyrannical, possessing royal fortune and established in great abundance.

If Venus rules the triplicity and culminates (is on the Midheaven) in Cancer, AND the lord of the triplicity and the lord of the Ascendant are benefic in their placement/condition., then Fortunate, leading, tyrannical, possessing royal fortune and established in great abundance.
If The planets are well-placed (in their own domicile or exaltation)., then Leading, fortunate, and lord of death.
If The lords of the triplicity are angular and on the Ascendant, AND the Lot of Fortune, Lot of Spirit, Lot of Basis, and the Ascendant fall into the same place., then Leading, tyrannical.
If Mars is peregrine and without testimony (un-witnessed) in the 3rd house, in opposition., then Exile and violence.
If Sun, Jupiter, and Venus in Pisces; Moon in Libra; Mars in Cancer; Mercury in Aquarius; Saturn in Scorpio; and the Ascendant in Leo., then Such a person is powerful and authoritative.
If The Sun is guarded by benefics AND found near the Lot of Fortune with its ruler., then Contributes to a powerful and authoritative nature.
If The co-rulers of the triplicity are badly placed (fall) AND the ruler of the Lot of Spirit is retrograde., then The person becomes unfortunate and lives badly.
If Mars opposed the Lot of Acquisition AND the ruler of the exaltation did not have a suitable place, but was overcome by Saturn., then The person becomes unfortunate.
If Most planetary configurations OR the rulers of the triplicity are found in suitable places., then They will be born in glory and splendor of life.
If Some planets/rulers are badly placed (fall) AND others are found in suitable places., then The matters of the Lot of Spirit and Lot of Fortune are without effort (easy).
If Planets are in the first house (Ascendant)., then They rule the first period of life.
If Planets are in the Midheaven, Descendant, or IC., then They rule periods of life after those in the first house.
If The angular houses (Ascendant, Midheaven, Descendant, IC) are empty of planets., then Planets in the succeedent houses rule the periods of life.
If The succeedent houses are also empty of planets., then Planets in the cadent houses rule the periods of life, and even if they are not so strong, they will manage affairs.
If Among planets in cadent houses, those that have declined from the Ascendant or Midheaven., then They rule the first period among the cadent house rulers.
If Among planets in cadent houses, those that are not immediately declined from the Ascendant or Midheaven., then They rule periods after those immediately declined from the Ascendant or Midheaven.
If If both the lord of the period and the lord of the revolution are well-disposed., then The matters of the times will be glorious and desirable.
If If both the lord of the period and the lord of the revolution are of a middle disposition., then The matters of the times will be of a middle nature.
If If both the lord of the period and the lord of the revolution are ill-disposed., then The nativity will be uneven from beginning to end, or will be surrounded by sorrows and dangers.

If Unless the Lot of Fortune or its lord is favorably configured in good fortune and glory according to its own substance., then The nativity will be established (i.e., not uneven, sorrowful, or dangerous).
planets: Lord of the Lot of Fortune

text: If If from the revolutions and periods, such times coincide with the operations of benefic or malefic stars., then Both good and bad things will happen at that time.
If If someone has the malefics in the times (χρόνους)., then It will make the nativity in exiles and troubles.
If The luminaries are setting., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If Mars sees the Lot of Fortune in the cadent house of the Midheaven., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If The Moon or most of the planets are in the subterranean hemisphere., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If The lord of Fortune is found in the Lot of Foreigners or its place., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If There is an opposition (diameter) to the Lot of Foreigners or its place., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If Fortune itself is near where the Lot of Exile is., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If Mars is superimposing or seeing the Lot of Exile., then Makes nativities prone to exile.
If The Lot of Foreigners is calculated from Saturn to Mars and the same from the Ascendant., then Makes nativities immobile.
If The Moon is about foreign places AND the Lot of Foreign Travel is opposite OR square., then The nativity is made in foreign lands or exile.
If The Moon is in the lower hemisphere (underground hemisphere)., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Foreign Travel falls into the Ascendant OR the Midheaven OR the 11th house (anaphora of the Midheaven)., then It makes many exiles for nativities.
If The nativity is not exilic by nature OR has the aforementioned figures (configurations) AND does NOT have opposing malefics., then Those born will have few exiles.
If The underground houses (1st-6th) have the rulers of the times OR the planetary rulers, WITHOUT the 12th OR 9th house., then They do NOT give exiles.
If The underground houses (1st-6th) have the rulers of the times, especially if the Lot of Foreign Travel also falls into the underground houses., then It gives exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel have malefics standing over them OR opposing them., then They produce frequent exiles.
If The ruler of the Lot of Foreign Travel is NOT opposing the rulers of the times in the zodiac., then The nativity will be made in exile.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house)., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house) AND are observed by a malefic., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house) AND are afflicted., then It makes many exiles.
If The Lot of Fortune AND the Lot of Foreign Travel fall into an underground angle (4th house) AND are combust (under light)., then It makes many exiles.
If The ruler of the times falls into one of the allotted signs., then It causes falls (downfalls).
If The ruler of the times falls into one of the allotted signs AND has an opposing malefic., then It causes falls (downfalls).
If The ruler of the times falls into one of the allotted signs AND the Lights (Sun/Moon) are obscured., then It causes falls (downfalls).
If The ephemeris is weak OR there is an opposing Lot., then The nativity will have temporary exile.
If Superior planets (Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are in the underground and moist places, having ephemerides., then They make exiles.
If Superior planets (Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are in the underground and moist places AND the Lights (Sun/Moon) are overlying the signs., then They make exiles.
If Superior planets (Mars, Jupiter, Saturn) are in the underground and moist places AND malefics are involved., then They make exiles.
If The Lord of the Year (profectional lord) transits specific signs (implied as fixed or obstructive), then Prevents departure or travel
If The Moon is in a cadent house falling away from the Ascendant in watery signs, with no benefic planet aspecting or present, then The native departs or travels abroad
If The Chronocrator (Lord of the Times) hands over the year to the Lord of the Lot of Travel while a malefic planet aspects it, then Travel or departure occurs, potentially with difficulty
If The Sun (representing the father) is afflicted by Mars or Saturn while benefics are absent, then The father dies before the mother
If The Moon or Venus (representing the mother) is afflicted by Mars or Saturn while benefics are absent, then The mother dies before the father
If Both luminaries (Sun and Moon) and Venus are afflicted by malefics, then The parent associated with the luminary of the sect or the one most afflicted dies first
If The Paternal Lot falls in a masculine sign, then The father dies before the mother
If The lord of the Paternal Lot is aspected by a malefic planet, then The father dies before the mother
If The Maternal Lot falls in a feminine sign, then The mother dies before the father
If A calculated point (days from epoch to birth mod 12, projected from the Moon) falls in a masculine sign, then The father dies before the mother
If A calculated point (days from epoch to birth mod 12, projected from the Moon) falls in a feminine sign, then The mother dies before the father
If Sun overcomes the Moon, then The mother dies before the father
If Moon overcomes the Sun, then The father dies before the mother
If Sun and Moon are unaspected and neither overcomes the other, then Take Saturn and Venus as significators for the parents
If Sun and Moon are unaspected and Saturn and Venus are not available, then Take Saturn and the Moon as significators for the parents
If Sun overcomes and Venus is positioned between the significators, then Venus intervenes in and modifies the overcoming
If Moon and Venus are afflicted by the two malefics (Saturn and Mars), then The mother dies before the father
If Saturn is in Cancer at night, rules the Sun's domicile, and is aspected by Jupiter and Venus, then The native receives the paternal inheritance
If Parental significators are in their own houses or exaltations and are aspected by a benefic, then The parents are noble, famous, and distinguished
If Parental significators are aspected by a malefic (destructive planet), then The parents are obscure and ignoble
If By day, the Sun, the sign the Sun is in, the ruler of the sign Jupiter is in, and the sign containing Jupiter, then These are the significators for the father
If The sign of the Moon, the ruler of the Moon, and by day, Venus and her sign, then These are the significators for the mother
If Mars with the Sun in square aspect to Saturn, then Causes orphanhood
If Saturn and Mars configured as vespertine (evening stars) without the aspect or oversight of Jupiter, then The native becomes an orphan of both parents
If Saturn with Jupiter while Jupiter is setting (occidental/under the beams), then Causes orphanhood
If Moon in a double-bodied sign and witnessed by Jupiter, then The native loses their father (becomes fatherless)
If Moon is underground (in the 4th house) or in the house of Mars, and Jupiter witnesses from his own house, then The native loses their father
If Saturn is the significator of the father, then The father is gloomy, envious, deeply wicked, malicious, filthy, secretive, overwhelmed by passions, unseemly, and a friend of the great
If Jupiter is the significator of the father, then The father is a lover of good, bright, generous, relaxed, and cheerful
If Mars is the significator of the father, then The father is bold, irascible, headstrong, abusive, reckless, much-moved, much-endangered, drunken, and wretched
If Moon is afflicted and Mars or Venus is the domicile master of the Moon, then The mother is rough, an adulteress, and troubled by diseases of the blood or corruption
If Venus witnesses the luminaries (Sun or Moon), then The parents are cheerful, music-lovers, merry, affectionate, and religious
If Mercury is the significator of the parents, then The parents are social, economical, skilled in reason or science, but often lying or erring with inferior persons
If Sun is in a masculine sign and witnessed by a masculine planet, then The father is noble
If Sun is in a feminine sign and witnessed by the Moon, then The father is relaxed and effeminate in mind
If Sun is in a feminine sign witnessed by Saturn and Venus, then The father is unhealthy or of doubtful/ambiguous parentage
If Moon is in a feminine sign and witnessed by masculine planets, then The mother is irascible and uncontrollable
If Moon is in a feminine sign and witnessed by Jupiter, then The mother is gentle and philanthropic
If Mars and Saturn interpose between the luminaries (Sun and Moon) or fall between the planets receiving them, then Causes the separation of the parents
If One luminary is according to the sect and the other is contrary to the sect, and a malefic planet is present with the one contrary to the sect, then Causes the separation of the parents
If Saturn is with the Sun and the Moon is alienated (not in aspect), then Causes the separation of the parents
If Saturn is positioned with the Sun while the Moon is alienated (not in aspect or reception), then Separation of the parents
If The Lord of the Ascendant is cadent or afflicted, and the co-dispositor is fallen, then Parents will be separated; the native will face instability, misfortune, and loss of parental inheritance
If The luminaries (Sun and Moon) and their dispositors are in harmonious aspect to each other, then The parents are in harmony
If The dispositor of the Sun is in harmony with the Moon, and the dispositor of the Moon is in harmony with the Sun, then The parents are in harmony
If The birth occurs during a waxing or new moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the first full moon in a feminine sign, then The mother will die before the father
If The birth occurs during a waxing or new moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the first full moon in a masculine sign, then The father will die before the mother
If The birth occurs during a full moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the next new moon in a feminine sign, then The mother will die before the father
If The birth occurs during a full moon and a malefic planet is at the degree of the next new moon in a masculine sign, then The father will die before the mother
If The Sun is located in the lower hemisphere (under the earth), then The father will likely die abroad
If Saturn is cadent from the angles while Mars applies to or witnesses Saturn, Jupiter, or the Sun, then The father will die abroad
If In a night birth, the Moon is above the earth and afflicted, or the Moon is cadent and afflicted by a malefic, then The mother will die before the father
If The Sun and its dispositor do not aspect the Ascendant, then The father will die abroad
If The Sun is afflicted by a malefic and Jupiter is overcome (by a malefic), then The father will suffer a violent death
If Saturn alone afflicts the indicators of the father, then Death by suffocation, dropsy, cold, poisoning, shipwreck, or old matters
If Mars alone afflicts the indicators of the father, then Death by iron/surgery, bites, hemorrhage, fire, or falls
If Both Saturn and Mars afflict the indicators of the father, then A violent death according to the nature of the planetary combination
If The place of the phase or the lord of the phase is cadent or afflicted by malefics, then The native will be of ignoble birth or, if born in glory, will be suddenly cast down
If The phase is found in an angle and its lord is witnessed by benefics, then The native will be noble and famous
If The place is in a profitable house but the lord is cadent or afflicted by malefics, then Born free or well-reared, the native will fall into reversals, subordination, and poverty

If The lord is in a profitable house but the place is cadent, especially if benefics aspect the lord, then Suffering and subordination in early life followed by freedom, progress, prosperity, and glory
If Both the place and the lord are cadent and both are afflicted by malefics, then The native will be an outcast or captive and experience subordination

If The place and lord are cadent and afflicted by malefics, but benefics are present or witness the configuration, then Release from subordination after the period of the malefics, followed by abundance
If The place is guarded by malefics but the lord is guarded by benefics, then Born as a subordinate but will become free or live in a state of support and adoption
If The place is guarded by benefics but the house-ruler is guarded by malefics, then Born free but will be reared into slavery or fall into subordination at the peak of their prime

If Moon in conjunction with the Sun (Synodos), then Signifies glory, power, royal and tyrannical dispositions, public affairs of cities, parents, marriages, mysteries, and universal or mundane matters.
If The Lord of the Conjunction (Synodos), its latitude, and its course, then Signifies the same matters as the conjunction itself: glory, power, and public affairs.
If The rising of the Moon (first appearance of light) and its Lord, then Signifies matters concerning life, action, and future substance; it confirms the actions initiated at the conjunction.
If Mercury with the Moon up to 4 degrees from the rising of light, then Strengthens the significations of the Moon's rising regarding life and action.
If Moon in Crescent phase (Menoiedes), then Signifies upbringing, things hoped for in life, and matters concerning women and the mother.
If Mercury with the Moon up to 8 degrees during the Crescent phase, then Strengthens the significations of the crescent phase regarding upbringing and women.
If Moon in First Dichotomy (First Quarter), then Signifies praise, suffering, violent occurrences, children, dignity, and future good things.
If Venus configured with the Moon up to 12 degrees during the first dichotomy, then Influences the significations of the first quarter, particularly regarding children and dignity.
If Moon in Gibbous phase (Amphikyrtos), then Signifies happiness, future progress, travel abroad, and the sympathy of relatives.
If Sun with the Moon up to 14 degrees during the gibbous phase, then Strengthens the significations of happiness and progress.
If Full Moon (Panselenos), then Signifies glory and infamy, travel abroad, violent events, those falling from high positions or rising from low ones, sympathies, sufferings, and political rivalries.
If The Lord of the Moon's decrease of light (Waning phase), then Signifies the decrease of possessions, decline in practical affairs, humiliation, and sudden falls.
If Mars as Lord of the Moon's waning up to 20 degrees, then Equivalent to the setting of light; signifies decline, loss of property, and sudden falls.
If Moon in Second Gibbous phase (Waning Gibbous), then Signifies living abroad, greater action, and happiness.
If Jupiter as Lord of the Moon up to 25 degrees during the second gibbous phase, then Strengthens the significations of happiness and successful action abroad.
If Moon in Second Dichotomy (Last Quarter), then Signifies old matters, long-lasting sufferings, and children.
If Jupiter is the lord and is in conjunction or significant phase with the Moon, then Prosperity and happiness

If Saturn is the lord during the second dichotomy (half-moon phase) until the 30th day, then Concerns regarding ancient matters, long-term sufferings or chronic illnesses, and matters involving children
If The lord of the crescent moon phase is active, then Signifies the death of a woman
If The lord of the crescent moon phase is active, then Loss of property or plunder
If The setting (occidental position) of the Moon or its lord, then Imprisonment, constraints, secret affairs, condemnation, and loss of status or dishonor
If The five planets and the Sun are located in difficult or 'unjust' centers (angles), then General misfortune or malefic results regarding the life path
If Malefics are present in the Lot of Fortune (1st house from the Lot), then Ailments or suffering related to the chest
If Malefics are present in the 2nd house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the side (pleura)
If Malefics are present in the 3rd house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the belly
If Malefics are present in the 4th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the hips
If Malefics are present in the 5th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the genitals
If Malefics are present in the 6th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the thighs
If Malefics are present in the 7th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the knees
If Malefics are present in the 8th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the shins
If Malefics are present in the 9th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the feet
If Malefics are present in the 10th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the head
If Malefics are present in the 11th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the face and neck
If Malefics are present in the 12th house from the Lot of Fortune, then Ailments or suffering related to the forearms and shoulders
If Malefics are present in the Lot of Spirit (1st house from the Lot), then Ailments or suffering related to the heart
If Malefics are present in the 2nd house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the inner belly
If Malefics are present in the 3rd house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the seminal tracts and kidneys
If Malefics are present in the 4th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the gall
If Malefics are present in the 5th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the liver
If Malefics are present in the 6th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the second belly
If Malefics are present in the 7th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the bladder
If Malefics are present in the 8th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the intestines
If Malefics are present in the 9th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the membranes, teeth, and hearing
If Malefics are present in the 10th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to swallowing and the throat
If Malefics are present in the 11th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the tongue
If Malefics are present in the 12th house from the Lot of Spirit, then Ailments or suffering related to the stomach
If The Moon is considered in the chart, then It signifies the Lot of Fortune and the physical body
If The Sun is considered in the chart, then It signifies the mind and the Lot of Spirit

If Aries is the sign under consideration for health, then Signifies the head and sense organs; causes headaches, cataracts, apoplexy, scars, dimness of vision, lepra, lichen, spasms, alopecia, baldness, loss of sensation, rot, condylomas, and fleshy growths
If Taurus is the sign under consideration for health, then Signifies the neck, face, swallowing, sense of smell, and nose; causes hunching (kyphosis) and lameness
If Aries (implied by context of head/start), then Headaches, blindness, leprosy, baldness, and ailments of the ears and teeth.
If Taurus, then Ailments of the neck, face, swallowing, and nose; curvature or lameness of the feet.
If Taurus (specifically the Pleiades), then Dangerous eye pains, blindness, or vision impairment.
If Taurus, then Inclination toward servitude or shameful acts; spasms, anthrax-like sores, and nasal polyps.
If Taurus, then Falls from heights or four-footed animals, broken limbs, and sciatica.
If Gemini, then Ailments of the shoulders, hands, fingers, joints, and nerves.
If Gemini (when afflicted), then Attacks by robbers or enemies, wounds, falls from heights, and amputations.
If Cancer, then Ailments of the chest, stomach, and spleen; hidden diseases.
If Cancer (specifically the Nebula/Praesepe), then Blindness or vision impairment.
If Cancer, then Leprosy, dropsy originating from the spleen, tooth decay, and squinting eyes.
If Cancer, then Harm from aquatic creatures, coughing, and lung diseases.

If In the 35th year, transmissions occur from the Ascendant and Mars to Saturn in Cancer, from the Moon to Mars, and from Venus to the Moon, then Each planet will manifest its inherent power (good or bad) according to its natal strength during this period
If The four angles (kentras) are active in a nativity, then They signify the years and determine the nature of the angles and their rulers
If A tropical sign is rising at the time of the rising of Sirius (the Dog Star), then The lord of the rising of Sirius is the general lord of the year
If Eclipses occur in profitable houses of the nativity, then Indicates eminent, leading, or royal births and significant changes in action or glory
If Eclipses occur in unprofitable houses of the nativity, then Indicates a humble or easily destroyed fortune
If Predicting life, bodily actions, or matters of the soul, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Ascendant (Horoskopos)
If Predicting glory, precedence, imagination, the father, or superior persons, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Sun
If Predicting bodily dangers, passions, bloodshed, or the mother, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Moon
If Predicting action (praxis), livelihood, and the soul, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Midheaven (MC)
If Predicting good fortune and the acquisition of livelihood, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Lot of Fortune
If Predicting death, change, or troubles, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the Descendant (Dysis)
If Predicting foundations, possessions, hidden things, or matters of the dead, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from the IC (Hypogeion)
If Predicting women, intercourse, or female matters, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from Venus
If Predicting military service or public affairs, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from Mars
If Predicting restoration of affairs, possessions, hidden passions, or paternal inheritance, then The release (aphesis) must be taken from Saturn
If Handover or reception from the Ascendant (Horoskopos), then Predicts matters concerning life and the body
If Handover or reception from the Midheaven (Mesouranema), then Predicts matters concerning action and advancement
If Handover or reception from the Descendant (Dysis), then Predicts matters concerning deaths, changes, or troubles
If Handover or reception from the IC (Hypogeion), then Predicts matters concerning dignities, possessions, secrets, or the dead
If Handover or reception from Venus, then Predicts matters concerning women, unions, associations, or feminine things
If Handover or reception from Mars, then Predicts matters concerning military service or public affairs
If Handover or reception from Saturn, then Predicts matters concerning the undoing of things, possessions, hidden sufferings, or paternal inheritance
If Handover or reception from Jupiter, then Predicts matters concerning glory, friendship, constitution, and acquisition
If Handover or reception from Mercury, then Predicts matters concerning partnership, slaves, bodily matters, giving and receiving, or writings
If Handover from an angular house to another angular house, then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If Handover from the 11th house (Good Spirit) to the Lot of Fortune or a profitable place, then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If Handover from cadent houses to angular houses, then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If Handover from the 12th house (Bad Spirit) to the 11th house (Good Spirit), then The predicted result will be effective and glorious
If The 6th house (Bad Fortune) in relation to the Midheaven, then The 6th house is considered better than the 12th house because it forms a trine aspect to the Midheaven
If Saturn and Jupiter are universal time-lords (chronocrators) and are well-placed in the nativity, then The native will receive an inheritance or benefit from the deceased

If Saturn and Jupiter rule the year in the second or third twelve-year cycle but are not universal time-lords, then The native will not be a full heir, but will receive a legacy, benefit from the dead, or purchase real estate and foundations
If The configuration of the stars in the solar return or transits matches the configuration found in the natal chart, then The predicted result is certain and firm
If The configuration of the stars in the solar return or transits is foreign or dissimilar to the natal chart, then The predicted result will not be complete or fully realized
If A time-lord cycle recurs at an age appropriate for marriage, then Marriage, cohabitation, or matters and anxieties concerning women
If A time-lord period previously associated with military service recurs, then Advancement, change, or military action
If The universal time-lord indicates advancement and benefics are in control of the period, then Great advancement and promotion
If A high-ranking nativity (great birth) coincides with a period of advancement, then The native will attain leadership, governorship, or a position of authority
If The general foundation of the chart is progressive and benefics are in control during the time-lord periods, then The native will experience great progress during those times
If The birth is of a great and high rank, then The native will attain leadership, governorship, or authoritative rank
If A time-lord transmission that previously produced a child recurs when the native is at a fertile age, then The native will have children again
If A time-lord transmission that previously produced a child recurs, then The native will purchase slaves or take care of/raise children (their own or others')
If A time-lord transmission associated with previous leadership recurs and the natal foundation is strong, then The native will receive great and distinguished commands or offices
If A time-lord transmission associated with previous leadership recurs but the natal foundation is moderate, then The native will live among leaders or have the illusion/appearance of command
If A time-lord transmission associated with previous imprisonment or detention recurs while benefics testify to the period, then The native will be released from detention or cleared of charges

If A time-lord transmission associated with previous imprisonment or detention recurs while malefics testify to the period, then The native will remain under charge due to a more wicked deed, face hateful accusations, or die

If Transiting planets ingress upon the planets handing over or receiving the time-lordship, then The transits bring about good or bad results, making the outcome more active or causing hindrances based on their nature

If A transit forms a harmonious aspect to the planet handing over the period, or the handing/receiving planets share their natal aspect, then The predicted result of the period is confirmed and certain
If A planet is setting (under the beams) during the transmission or reception of a time-lord period, then The planet becomes inactive and acts as a source of hindrance
If A benefic planet is setting (under the beams) during the transmission of a period, then The planet provides only the appearance or illusion of benefit
If The Sun, Moon, and Ascendant signify dissimilar or conflicting outcomes for the year, then The year will be varied, inconsistent, or unstable in its results
If The count from the Moon ends in Aries or Scorpio and the sign is empty, but the count from Mars is given to Saturn, then The year will be dangerous and full of trouble
If Benefics giving or receiving time-lordship from angles or high places, then Great goods and fame
If Benefics giving or receiving time-lordship from succedent houses, then Middling results
If Benefics giving or receiving time-lordship from cadent houses, then Weaker results
If Benefics in opposition, then Less effective and troublesome results
If Malefics in angles, then Worst results and very bad conditions
If Malefics in succedent houses, then Middling results and causes manifest later
If Malefics in cadent houses, then Lessened malice and weaker evil effects
If Malefics in opposition, then Indicators of oppositions and dangers
If Malefics in superior position (overcoming) receiving time-lordship from the overcome planet, then Worse evils are produced
If Malefics in opposition to benefics and receiving from them, then Worse evils and negative outcomes
If Planets in trine configuration, then More harmonious and milder results
If A planet receiving time-lordship, then More active influence than the planet giving the period
If Benefic giving to benefic or malefic giving to benefic, then Better and more positive results
If Malefic giving to malefic, then Worst possible results
If Release (aphesis) falls in an empty sign but a planet enters that sign by transit, then That planet takes over the time-lordship
If A planet makes a phase (rising, setting, or station) in the sign of the release, then More effective and powerful results
If A planet merely transits the sign of release without making a phase, then Ineffective and weak results
If Planets are setting (under the beams) or in retrogradation, then Ineffective results
If Planets are rising (heliacal) or in station, then Effective and powerful results
If The same stars repeat the same configurations in critical years, then More certain and stable results for actions and climacteric periods
If Planets are setting (descending) or in retrogradation, then The astrological effects and predictions will be weak or ineffective (atonoi)
If Planets are rising (ascending) or in station, then The astrological effects and predictions will be strong or effective (eutonoi)

If The same planets repeat the same configuration or aspect in a period as they held in the natal chart, then The predicted results regarding practical matters and critical periods are more certain and confirmed
If The native reaches the 31st year of life (year LA) and planets are found in climacteric distributions, then This year acts as a critical climacteric period (klimakterizousin)
If Moon and Saturn are in a state of restoration (apokatastasis) to each other during a specific time period, then The period is identified as a climacteric or critical turning point

If The lords of the nativity in current transits (parodoi) maintain the same relationship or disposition they had at birth, then The time periods become invariably active and significant (chrematistikoi)
If Moon and Saturn are found restoring or returning to each other (apokatastasis) during the five-year period, then A significant klimakteric (critical) period is established
If Mars and Venus are found in relation to Saturn during the seven-year period, then A significant klimakteric (critical) period is established
If The ninth year klimakter is reached, then The period is ruled by the Sun, Mars, Mercury, the Ascendant, and Venus
If The tenth year klimakter is reached, then The period is ruled by the Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, and the Ascendant, handing over to the Sun, Mercury, Jupiter, and Saturn

If Sun in Aquarius, Moon in Leo, Saturn in Cancer, Jupiter in Gemini, Mars in Scorpio, Venus in Aries, and Mercury in Pisces, then Specific configuration for the release (aphesis) from the Moon according to Critodemus
If Astrological aspects are square (tetragonoi), then They are considered simple (haploi) in nature for klimakteric calculation
If Astrological aspects are oblong or unequal (heteromekeis), then They are considered composite (synthetoi) in nature for klimakteric calculation
If The 21st year is reached (3 times 7) with the Sun in Aquarius, then The period is significant in relation to the Sun
If The 1st year of life (first climacteric), then The native will experience weakness and fear
If The 2nd year of life (second climacteric), then Danger through liquids or water
If The 3rd year of life (Saturn's first climacteric), then A precarious and dangerous period
If The 5th year of life (Venus's climacteric), then The native will suffer from weakness
If The 6th year of life (Saturn's second climacteric), then A critical period of danger
If The 7th year of life (Mars's first climacteric), then Danger involving fevers, loss of blood, wounds, falls, ulcers, or surgery
If The 8th year of life (Mercury's first climacteric), then An incoherent or unstable state of health or affairs
If The 9th year of life (Jupiter's first and Saturn's third climacteric), then Danger, weakness, chills, fevers, and internal or stomach pains
If The 10th year of life (Venus's second climacteric), then Weakness resulting from plethora or excess
If The 12th year of life (Saturn's fourth climacteric), then Unexpected dangers or crises involving liquids
If The 13th year of life (Moon's first climacteric), then Difficult fevers, falls, and internal or chest pains
If The 14th year of life (Mars's second climacteric), then A difficult and dangerous period
If The 16th year of life (Mercury's second climacteric), then A composite illness or crisis involving bile
If The number of the year coincides with the distance (in degrees or signs) to a specific planet, then The year becomes effective and significant for business and wealth
If The year does not coincide with any planetary distance in the chart, then The year is ineffective for business and wealth
If Saturn at 21, Jupiter at 8, Mercury at 9, then Harsh and death-bearing
If Saturn at 22, Venus at 12, then Dangerous
If Mars at 11, then Difficult and death-bearing
If Saturn at 27, Moon at 6, then Harsh
If Venus at 16, Mercury at 10, then Blended or temperate
If Saturn at 27, Jupiter at 9, then Dangerous
If Saturn at 28, Mars at 11, then Difficult and malefic
If Venus at 7, then Common or neutral
If Saturn at 29, then Dangerous
If Saturn at 30, Venus at 18 or Jupiter at 10, then Harsh
If Venus at 19, then Not good
If Saturn at 12, then Difficult
If Mars at 14, then Harsh
If Saturn at 33, then Moderate or middle
If Venus at 20, then Not bad
If Saturn at 34, then Harsh
If Saturn at 32, Venus at 21, Mars at 12, then Difficult
If Saturn at 37, then Death-bearing
If Venus at 22, then Not bad
If Saturn at 30, then Precarious
If Mars at 17, Mercury at 14, then Difficult and terrible
If Saturn at 38, then Dangerous
If Venus at 23, then Common or neutral
If Saturn at 39, Moon at 9, Jupiter at 13, then Dangerous
If Mars (unspecified year), then Precarious
If Saturn at 40, Venus at 24, then Death-bearing
If Sun, Jupiter, and Mars in Sagittarius hand over to Saturn in Sagittarius, then The handover is harsh
If Malefic planets aspecting climatic years or falling out of sect, then Precarious and turbulent times, loss of rank, accusations, shipwrecks, fears, penalties, sudden dangers, and physical injuries
If Climacteric stars are in opposition to the natal positions or are aspected by malefics while being contrary to sect, then The period will be dangerous and turbulent
If Climacteric stars are in their own configuration or proper aspect, then The attacks of the period are diminished and the climacteric becomes milder
If Transmission or reception occurs between signs of equal ascension: Aries and Pisces, then The influence or period is handed over between these signs
If Transmission or reception occurs between signs of equal ascension: Taurus and Aquarius, then The influence or period is handed over between these signs
If Transmission or reception occurs between signs of equal ascension: Gemini and Capricorn, then The influence or period is handed over between these signs
If Transmission or reception occurs between signs of equal ascension: Cancer and Sagittarius, then The influence or period is handed over between these signs
If Transmission or reception occurs between signs of equal ascension: Leo and Scorpio, then The influence or period is handed over between these signs
If Transmission or reception occurs between signs of equal ascension: Virgo and Libra, then The influence or period is handed over between these signs
If The astrologer accurately calculates the centers (angles) and powerful places through numbers and calculation, then The prediction reveals the truth of existing and future matters
If Accurate determination of the centers (angles) and powerful places (dynastikoi topoi), then The prognosticator can accurately declare the state of the native's affairs and future
If The interaction or coming together of Fate (Heimarmene) and Fortune (Tyche), then The native is rendered either blessed and prosperous or ill-starred and unfortunate
If The application of numerical calculations and transmissions (profections or chronocrators), then The ability to make declarations regarding the native's existing circumstances
If The disposition of the body and intelligence being in harmony with the native's Fate, then The native becomes a successful craftsman or methodical in actions, even if uneducated
If Planetary movement (wandering) through specific configurations of Fate and Fortune, then Leads the native to increase, glory, prosperity, and prominence

If The Sun's fixed courses according to the addition and subtraction of numbers and its entry into the solstices, then Signifies changes of seasons, sunrises and sunsets, days and nights, cold and heat, and temperate air

If The Moon's irregular courses, including its inclinations, withdrawals, increases and decreases in light, and its height and depth, then Governs wind movements, conjunctions, emanations, eclipses, and the beginning and end of all things born on earth and sea

If The five wandering stars (Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, Venus, Mercury) in their unstable courses and varied phases, then Determines the beginning and end of all things born and the governance of the earth, sea, and sky
If Fate (Heimarmene) and Fortune (Tyche) acting through the planetary movements to favor an individual, then Increases glory, leads to prosperity and prominence, and makes the individual blessed
If Fate (Heimarmene) and Fortune (Tyche) acting through the planetary movements to afflict an individual, then Brings destruction, danger, hatred, and makes the individual ill-fated or ill-reputed
If The Moon's waxing and waning, speed, height, and depth, then Determines the state of the earth, sea, and sky, and the beginning and end of all generated beings
If The Moon's unequal motions and phases, then Influences the flow and direction of winds
If Eclipses and occultations, then Governs the beginning and end of all things born
If The five planets (Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, Venus, Mercury) completing their periodic cycles, then They return to their original places and restore their fixed nature despite irregular appearances
If Fear and hesitation in the mind during the investigation of affairs, then The successful outcome of affairs is obscured and the mind fails to remain stable in its logic
If Knowledge of secret methods regarding critical times (chronocrators), then Allows for the prediction of future events and the removal of error through truth

If The degree-based distance and conjunction of times are calculated from the degree of one star to the degree of another according to the sequence of signs, then Determines the timing of events (hours, days, months, years) and the manifestation of the stars' natural energies and transmissions
If The rays of the stars fall upon a specific degree either at the time of birth or by transit (epembasis), then Exceptional and great things are brought to pass
If The distribution of times is analyzed according to degree-based distance and conjunction, then Distinguishes between effective (empraktos) and ineffective (apraktos) periods of time

If The collected number of degrees is distributed into periodic hours, days, months, and years, then Predicts the specific effects of the stars based on their natural activity and the quality of their transmissions
If Rays of planets fall upon the aphetic degree either natally or by transit (epembasis), then Exceptional and great events occur
If Various releases (aphesis) and joinings (kollēsis) of both benefics and malefics occur simultaneously, then The results are varied, successive, and easily changeable
If Multiple time-lord releases (aphesis) coincide at the same time, then The native experiences many different affairs and events simultaneously
If A threatening eclipse falls upon a distribution (paradosis) but is coincided by a benefic distribution, then The threat is obscured or diminished by the benefic influence
If A benefic distribution is met by a malefic cause or influence, then The positive effects of the benefic distribution are hindered or prevented

If Planets are positioned in angles (kentra), succedent (epanaphorai), or cadent (apoklimata) houses, then The specific house placement determines the strength and manifestation of the predicted results
If Planets are in their proper sect (hairesis), rising, or setting, then The sect and phase of the planet modify the quality of the time-lord results
If Transits (epembasis) occur by conjunction, testimony (aspect), or opposition to the active time-lord periods, then They contribute significantly to the reversal or successful completion of affairs
If Transits (ingresses) occur by conjunction, aspect, or opposition to significant places or the lords of the times, then Contributes significantly to the reversal or success of matters

If The degree of the conjunction (synaphe) and the three degrees on either side are considered, then The timing of the effect will be clearly anticipatory or persistent, similar to the duration of an eclipse
If The planet handing over (paradidous) the time period aspects the planet taking over (paralambanon) in a familiar or useful way, then The predicted result is effective and clearly manifested
If A conjunction's influence remains active, then It persists until another planet intervenes and breaks its power
If The Sun is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 19 months per sign and 19 days per degree
If The Moon is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 25 months per sign and 25 days per degree
If Saturn is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 30 months (2 years and 6 months) per sign and 30 days per degree
If Jupiter is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 12 months (1 year) per sign and 12 days per degree
If Mars is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 15 months per sign and 15 days per degree
If Venus is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 8 months per sign and 8 days per degree
If Mercury is the chronocrator (lord of the time), then It distributes 20 months per sign and 20 days per degree
If Mars hands over the time period to Jupiter, then The result is better than when Jupiter hands over to Mars
If Malefic planets outnumber benefic planets in the distribution of times, then The predicted outcome is negative
If Benefic planets outnumber malefic planets in the distribution of times, then The predicted outcome is positive
If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) changes, as in the case of twins, then The fate and outcomes are differentiated even if planetary positions are identical
If Malefic planets prevail over benefic planets in the distribution of time periods, then The predicted result is negative and harmful
If Benefic planets prevail over malefic planets in the distribution of time periods, then The predicted result is positive and beneficial

If The Ascendant (Horoskopos) changes, even if planetary degrees remain the same (as in the case of twins), then The centers (angles) are altered, changing the fortune, social standing, and the end of life for the native

If A planet is positioned in a center (angle) relative to another planet, or one is in the Ascendant while the other is in the Midheaven, then The testimony or aspect between the planets becomes more powerful and effective
If A benefic planet rules the time period (chronocratorship) without any malefic intervention, then The native becomes practical, healthy, wealthy, successful, fortunate, bold, and intelligent
If A malefic planet rules the time period (chronocratorship), then The native becomes inactive, sickly, easily overcome, full of opposition, weak, and cowardly
If A planet is a provider (poriastes) and well-aspected (euepibolos) in the native's chart, then The native is fortunate, bold, and intelligent, even if they lack formal education
If A malefic planet (kakopoios) governs the current time period (chronocrator), then The native becomes inactive, sickly, and faces many oppositions and obstacles
If A malefic planet rules the time period and the native is in a state of despair, then The native may be perceived as weak, cowardly, or villainous, and hopes are turned to despair

If Benefic planets (agathopoioi) are poorly placed or afflicted while ruling the time period, then Mixed results occur; benefit is accompanied by harm, and glory is followed by downfall, accusations, or illness
If The hand-over (paradosis) of a time period is to malefic planets, then Expected benefits fail, leading to empty hopes and painful losses
If The hand-over (paradosis) of a time period is to benefic planets, then Success is achieved but only after delay, hardship, and overcoming opposition
If Astrological configurations or distances between planets are far apart, then The predicted results manifest slowly or are delayed
If Astrological configurations or distances between planets are in close proximity, then The predicted results manifest quickly and concisely
If A malefic planet intervenes or takes over a time period from another through opposition, then Downfall occurs due to accusations, envy, and loss of status
If Distant intervals between planets or points, then Slower manifestation of the predicted effects
If Close intervals between planets or points, then Quick or brief manifestation of the predicted effects
If A benefic planet (agathopoios) takes over the time period or transit, then Advancement, faith, benefit, happiness, and good deeds for a short time
If A malefic planet (kakopoios) takes over the time period or transit, then Accusation, envy, downfall, dishonor, misfortune, and sudden danger
If A benefic planet restores its influence after a malefic period, then Restoration of fortune and glory
If Benefic planets are present at the degree of the Ascendant, then Praise, health, pleasant times, and a strong, undisturbed soul
If Malefic planets are present at the degree of the Ascendant, then Critical times (climacterics), illness, and dangerous periods
If The soul or ruling planet is afflicted (kakosis), then Confusion, senselessness, wickedness, mania, and potential separation of the soul from the body
If Harmonious mixing (eukrasia) of planetary natures, then Good temperament, beauty, and success
If Disharmonious or 'blind' mixing of planetary natures, then Unpleasant character, confusion of nature, and lack of clarity in life
If Planets are mixed harmoniously (eukrasia), then The native achieves beauty, success, and a well-ordered life.
If Planets are mixed poorly or in confusion (tholor), then The native experiences blind results, lack of beauty, and confusion in life's affairs.
If Saturn (Cronos) is the significator or prominent, then The native's life is characterized by slowness and things becoming manifest only over long periods of time.
If Jupiter (Zeus) is the significator or prominent, then The native receives the cause of life and good gifts/bodies.
If Mars (Ares) is the significator or prominent, then The native experiences a fiery, sharp, and destructive nature; Mars acts to take away from benefics and life.
If The Sun (Helios) is the significator or prominent, then The native's life is characterized by purity, radiance, and eternal qualities.
If Venus (Aphrodite) is the significator or prominent, then The native is mastered by desires, leading to many diverse outcomes, both good and bad, and governs unions.
If Mercury (Hermes) is the significator or prominent, then The native possesses intelligence, skill in speech, but also bitterness; the native's complexion will be pale or bilious.
If The Moon (Selene) is the significator or prominent, then The native's actions and thoughts are unstable, irregular, and airy in nature.
If Mercury (Hermes) is the ruler of the nativity, then The native will possess intelligence, the power of speech, and a tendency toward bitterness.
If Mercury (Hermes) is the ruler of the nativity, then The native will have a pale complexion similar to the color of bile.
If The Moon (Selene) is the ruler of the nativity, then The native's actions and thoughts will be unstable, irregular, and changeable, mirroring the Moon's course.
If Malefic planets (Saturn, Mars) are active in the chart, then They exert more power and influence than benefic planets, often obscuring or staining the good qualities of the nativity.
If Malefic planets are present in a nativity, even one that appears fortunate, then They act as critics and destroyers of possessions, bringing accusations, pains, and physical or mental sufferings.
If The native is under the influence of benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus), then The native will be simple-minded and trusting, often leading them to be easily deceived or caught by others.

If The native is under the influence of malefic planets (Saturn, Mars), then The native will be suspicious, greedy, and prone to taking advantage of others, finding pleasure in the deprivation of others.
If Malefic planets dominate the nativity's end of life, then The native may face a violent end or be driven to self-harm due to the weight of their misfortunes.
If The lords of the times (chronocrators) transit their own natal places or are in square or opposition to those places, then The ingresses and transits are judged to be vigorous and highly effective
If A planet that has been allotted the hour or authority makes an ingress, then It acts to either preserve or destroy according to its inherent nature and the current time-lordship

If A planet is the active lord of the time (chronocrator) and issues a threat or benefit, then No other factor can prevent its effect; it yields only to the laws of the specific time period until its term is completed
If A planet completes its allotted time period and hands over leadership (paradosis) to another planet, then The planet becomes ineffective and weak in producing either good or evil results
If The exact degree (moira) of a planet or point is accurately determined according to its natural activity, then It becomes possible to make firm and certain predictions about future events
If Diurnal birth with the Sun well-placed, then The Sun is taken as the releasor (aphetis) of the times
If Nocturnal birth with the Moon well-placed, then The Moon is taken as the releasor (aphetis) of the times
If Both luminaries (Sun and Moon) are poorly placed, then The first planet found following the Ascendant (Horoskopos) in zodiacal order takes the first period of time
If Sun is the releasor in the dekaeteris (ten-year period) system, then The Sun rules for a period of 10 years and 9 months
If A planet follows the initial releasor in the zodiacal order during the dekaeteris system, then The subsequent planet rules for a period of 10 years and 9 months
If The planet handing over a time period and the planet receiving it have a friendly or familiar disposition, then The period results in good (agathon) effects
If The planet handing over a time period and the planet receiving it have a hostile or contrary disposition, then The period results in bad (phaulon) effects

If The time-lordship passes from a benefic planet (agathopoios) to a malefic planet (kakopoios), then The malefic power is mitigated or prepared by the preceding benefic, leading to various resources, friendships, sympathies, prosperity, glory, and utility.

If The time-lordship passes from a benefic planet to a malefic planet specifically regarding secret, risky, or paradoxical actions, then Success is achieved in these actions, but the native later regrets them or feels they were a waste of time.
If The times of benefic planets are handed over to malefic planets, then Enmity, dishonor, treachery, strife, danger, sudden and unexpected accusations, and downfalls occur.
If The Moon is in Pisces in a nocturnal birth, located under the earth in a feminine sign and in its own triplicity, then The Moon becomes the ruler of the universal times (chronocrator).
If Saturn is the Horoskopos (Ascendant) in Sagittarius, then Saturn takes part in the sequence of time-lordship following Jupiter.
If The time-lordship passes into the hands of benefic planets, then One should predict good things (agathon).

If Saturn acts as the chronocrator contrary to the sect, positioned in the Ascendant (Horoskopos) and overcoming the Moon (the aphesis)., then Death of a wife, dangerous diseases, financial losses, and legal judgments regarding women or the deceased.
If Saturn overcomes Mercury during its period as chronocrator., then Occurrence of many forgeries and false accusations.

If Saturn rules the time and is involved with matters of the dead or ancient things., then Entanglement in dangerous and harmful business, leading to despair and damage to personal or external affairs.

If Mars takes over the general chronocratorship from the Moon, while Saturn takes over the monthly rule from Mars, and Venus takes the daily rule from Saturn., then Death of a wife, dangerous diseases, and financial losses.

If A legal judgment is rendered concerning a woman, matters of the dead, or ancient affairs under the influence of Saturn., then The native is condemned or suffers distress and danger, potentially leading to the ruin of their own or others' property.
